elements.text:
You are meeting with your professor. To make it on-time, you just walked up two flights of stairs quickly, and feel your heart beating very rapidly.

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I take a few sips from my water bottle.
I take a few deep breaths.
I start looking up symptoms of a heart attack online to see if I'm dying.
I want to panic, but remind myself that my heart racing is just reaction to coming up the stairs quickly.
I feel the urge to tell my professor that something's really wrong with me, but remind myself that I'm actually OK.
